---
name: UX Feedback
about: Report a usability issue or suggest a UI improvement
title: "[UX] "
labels: ux, triage
---

## UX Feedback

**OpenWand version:** v0.1.0-alpha (commit `967dc96` or later)

### UI Surface

- [ ] Desktop UI — Session tab
- [ ] Desktop UI — Console tab
- [ ] Desktop UI — Inspector tab
- [ ] Desktop UI — Workflow surfaces (evidence chain, operator console, etc.)
- [ ] CLI (`openwand` binary)
- [ ] Other: ________

### Issue Type

- [ ] Visual bug / rendering problem
- [ ] Missing interaction / dead-end UI
- [ ] Confusing behavior / unclear feedback
- [ ] Accessibility concern
- [ ] Feature suggestion

### Description

Describe the UX issue or suggestion.

### Current Behavior

What currently happens.

### Expected / Suggested Behavior

What you expected or would like to see instead.

### Screenshots (Optional)

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

### Context

**Note:** 9 workflow surfaces currently use 3-line placeholder stubs.
These are known gaps (see `docs/KNOWN_GAPS.md`). Reports about placeholder
content are welcome but will not be treated as new defects.
